Defendant-Cross-Complainant Luis Limas Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Norhier Keshishians Cross Complaint For Failure To Prosecute Pursuant To C.C.P. Section 583.420
Off Calendar Mar-07-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT/CROSS COMPLAINANT LUIS LIMA's Motion To Dismiss Norhier Keshishians Cross Complaint For Failure To Prosecute Pursuant To C.C.P. Section 583.420.

Cross-defendant Luis Lima's motion to dismiss the cross-complaint filed by cross-complainant Norhier Keshishian is granted. No opposition filed.

Order is signed.(see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. (D302/HK)
